name: we
description: Agentic Product Ownership toolkit for Claude Code — story refinement, development orchestration, code review, CI automation, and optional AI companion augmentation.

companion.title: Companion Name
companion.description: Name of your weside Companion (optional — requires weside.ai account). Leave empty for no companion.

autoMaterialize.title: Auto-load Companion
autoMaterialize.description: Automatically load your Companion at session start (requires weside.ai account)

ticketingTool.title: Ticketing Tool
ticketingTool.description: Which ticketing tool to use: auto, jira, github-issues, or none. 'auto' detects from available MCP servers and CLI tools.

projectKey.title: Project Key
projectKey.description: Jira project key or GitHub repo for issue tracking (e.g. 'PROJ', 'myorg/myrepo'). Auto-detected if not set.

autoStoreConversations.title: Auto-store Conversations
autoStoreConversations.description: Store each meaningful conversation turn as a companion memory (requires weside.ai account + MCP connection)
